decisions.rationale: Observation's base_record_id is route_b46-local-limited-20110915, which already owns source 2013_09_12_sbs_utica_cb8. The observation already resolves to this canonical record. Per policy, when the closest match is the observation's own base_record_id, the decision is new. No different registry record is a better match — route_b46-limited-2012 and route_b46-local-2012 are variant-specific (limited and local respectively), while this observation describes the general B46 route, consistent with the bundled 'local and limited-stop' route_type on route_b46-local-limited-20110915.

evidence_refs.source_quote: B46: second busiest bus route in NYC
